# BP-110 negative variant: a non-Gin context with a matching method name is ignored.
lang: go
file: BP-110-variant-safe.go
variant: non-gin
---
package sample

type Context struct{}

func (Context) ShouldBindJSON(any) error { return nil }

func update(ctx Context) {
	var payload struct {
		Name string
	}
	if err := ctx.ShouldBindJSON(&payload); err != nil {
		return
	}
}
